professional_summary_base: Cloud Infrastructure Architect with 16 years of success in enterprise-scale IT operations, including 6+ years of Azure specialization. Proven impact in designing resilient hybrid cloud architectures, establishing governance for regulated environments (Healthcare/SaaS), and driving 20%+ cost optimization. Strategic leader with experience aligning business objectives with high-availability infrastructure modernization and security-first platform design.
career_highlights: Orchestrated global Azure infrastructure for 16+ years, managing cumulative project budgets exceeding $[5M]+.
Led high-impact migrations for 500+ heterogeneous server instances to Azure with zero business downtime.
Consistently delivered 15-20% annualized cloud cost savings across multiple enterprise organizations.
Hardened healthcare and financial sector environments to achieve 100% compliance with industry-standard audits.
Architected Disaster Recovery solutions for Tier-0 applications with recovery time objectives (RTO) reduced by 50%.

bullets: Orchestrate reliability frameworks and disaster recovery strategies for global enterprise clients, mitigating systemic failover risks by an estimated 25%.
Audit multi-region Azure HA/DR architectures to identify and remediate resilience gaps across compute, networking, and identity layers.
Direct the validation of high-availability blueprints utilizing Azure Availability Zones and Site Recovery for mission-critical workloads.
Architect Azure Landing Zone governance models ensuring 100% compliance across multi-subscription enterprise environments.
Modernize Major Incident Response strategies to align technical recovery with business-critical SLA objectives.
Strategize business continuity and failover readiness across complex hybrid infrastructure components.
Direct engineering teams through actionable technical roadmaps derived from deep architectural assessments.
Standardize cloud performance audits, improving workload efficiency by 18% quarterly.
Lead integration efforts for secure hybrid connectivity (ExpressRoute/VPN) ensuring low-latency access for distributed global teams.
Directed cloud infrastructure strategy and operational lifecycle management for multi-stage enterprise environments (Dev/Staging/Prod).
Mentored a 5-member cloud engineering team, implementing architectural best practices that improved deployment velocity by 15%.
Architected an enterprise-wide observability framework using Azure Monitor and Grafana, resulting in a 40% MTTR reduction.
Engineered incident response and change management governance that reduced operational friction by 30%.
Optimized Azure cost architecture through granular tagging and resource lifecycle management, delivering 15% in annualized savings.
Automated provisioning pipelines with Terraform to expedite environment parity between staging and production instances.
Enhanced infrastructure posture by implementing zero-trust identity policies using Azure Entra ID.
Architected secure-by-design Azure foundations for mission-critical enterprise workloads.
Engineered advanced virtual networking architectures, including cross-region peering and granular NSG-based micro-segmentation.
Optimized compute performance and architectural footprint for 80+ VM instances, yielding a 15% efficiency gain.
Established automated data protection strategies and recovery blueprints with a 100% audit-validated success rate.
Delivered Azure infrastructure support, monitoring, and performance tuning for 10+ core enterprise environments.
Supported hybrid migration planning and subscription optimization initiatives that identified 10% in potential savings.
Orchestrated large-scale hybrid cloud transformation and landing zone architecture for enterprise business units.
Engineered high-governance Azure environments incorporating automated Policy enforcement and RBAC-tightening.
Hardened enterprise security posture through MFA and Security Center integration, raising the Secure Score by 25%.
Architected enterprise-grade disaster recovery using Azure Site Recovery for Tier-0 application clusters.
Designed healthcare-compliant Azure environments ensuring high availability.
Implemented disaster recovery and backup automation.
Managed enterprise IT infrastructure operations for 150+ servers and 1,000+ endpoints.
Implemented disaster recovery planning and backup strategies achieving 99.9% availability.
Managed server deployments and enterprise IT support.
Delivered onsite and remote technical support.

certifications: Microsoft Certified: Azure Solutions Architect Expert (AZ-305)
